children.heading: Demonstration and technology transfer program
children.label: a Demonstration and technology transfer program
children.text: The Secretary shall establish a program for the demonstration of innovative technologies for solar and other renewable energy sources in buildings owned or operated by a State or local government, and for the dissemination of information resulting from such demonstration to interested parties.

children.heading: Limit on Federal funding
children.label: b Limit on Federal funding
children.text: Notwithstanding , the Secretary shall provide under this section no more than 40 percent of the incremental costs of the solar or other renewable energy source project funded.section 16352 of this title
to demonstrate a continuing commitment to the use of solar and other renewable energy sources in buildings they own or operate; and
to state how they expect any award to further their transition to the significant use of renewable energy.
